titleStmt.title: SII 20.38: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 38. (B.K. No. 91 of 1938-39.) KUYIBĀḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab standing close to the village Chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 980, Vilambi, Pushya, śu • • Sunday-Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The saṁkrānti occurred in A.D. 1058, December 24, when the week-day was Thursday and the tithi was śu. 7.

The inscription records a gift of land to god Jōgēśvara (?) by Mahāsāmanta Indrakēsiyarasa who was governing over Purigeṟe-300 division as Rāshṭrakūṭaka, and others. It mentions Tantrapāḷa Chāvuṇḍamayya who was also perhaps a donor. The gift was made over to Lōkābharaṇa-paṇḍita.

The second part of the record registers a gift of land to the same god at Kuyillabāḷa, by certain gāvuṇḍas whose names are lost. Lōkābharaṇa-paṇḍita was the recipient of this gift. This is dated in the month of Śrāvaṇa, śu. 11, Monday, other details not being given. The date cannot be verified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
raścuṁbi candracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyavijayāraṁbha mūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
pṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatā
mire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantaṁ [.] dā vanarēvantadaṇa
prasūta siṁhalāṁcchanaṁ praṇa kāraṁ svaradēvanaṁ mahēśvara bhagavadarha
ramabhaṭṭāraka pa kāra samyaktvaratnā pracaṇḍamaṇḍaḷāgra
kāminīkāmaṁ maṇalerabhīmaṁ vairimanneyara pāṣaṇḍa vīramurāri visada manneya
ruḷa manneya baṁgāṟaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ sāmantamanneya śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvapā
nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantanindrakēsiyarasar purigeṟemū
ṣṭakūṭakanāgi duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ geydu . sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadindarasu
vṛtti brāhmaṇa
ntāpakara
maṇalera bhīmana .
ḷita nāma
tōṟuvudu manneya siṁgana
tuṟaga gaṁ turaṁga vīrabhaṭabrajapaṭu bhaṭa
negaḻda
bare mattiṟiyalke
bāḷmaṇalera bhīmana . poga[®te] gi bhūpabaḷaṁ
bācaniṁ gōcara saṁkuḷakke
worn out
nenisida śrīmattaṁtra
pāḷa cāvuṇḍamayyaṁ pramukha pradhānaruṁ parigrahamumanukūḷarāge jōgēsvaraṁ palavuṁ kālaṁ ke
ṭṭina raṁge yindrēsvara śrīmanmahāsāmantanindrakēsiyarasaruṁ gāvuṇḍuga
ḷuṁ pannasigaru voḷamba koḷaṁgeyivāḍaṁ sakavarṣa 980 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha
Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇasamādhisa
mpannarappa śaktiparseya lōkābharaṇapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karci naiṣṭhikasthānamāge cāvagāvuṇḍana sōbhanagāvuṇḍana vo
ladoḷ ceṇḍike vuṇuseyiṁ mūḍaṁ muḻiyaṁgēri sīmeyiṁ baḍagaṇa deseyoḷ sarvvanamasyaṁ sarvvabādhāpari
hāramāge [ ]gēṇa gaḷeyoḷ biṭṭa keymattaṟu panneraḍu © Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
doḷsāsirvva brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyaṁ dānageyda paḷamakkumī dharmmamanaḷida mahāpāta
narakagāmiyakku . © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētunṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ .
rvvānētānbhāvinaṟpārttivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ ©
bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadābhūmistasya tasya
tadā phaḷaṁ . © śrīmat Aṟavavvageya jōgimayyaṁ śivapadapaṁkajabhramaranīsvaradāsi
sāsanama niṟisidaṁ maṁgaḷa © © ©
© śrāvaṇa su 11 sōmavāradaṁdu dakṣiṇāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadaṁdu kuyilli bāḷa śrī jōgēThis and the following
svaradēvargge lōkābharaṇapaṁṇḍitara kālaṁ kacci dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi dattiya
para baṁmmagāvu ra rājagāvuṇḍanuṁ vagāvuṇḍugaḷuṁ paṁ
camaṭha sthāna mukhyavāgi dēvara nivēdya vaḷḷadiṁ karuva gēri yiṁ paḍuvalu
gāvuṇḍanalli kamma 550 baṁmmagāvuṁḍanalli ka 400 rāja gāvuṇḍanalli kamma 200 A
ntu mattaru kaṁmma 400 sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa kaṁmma Iṁtī dharmmavanū pratipāḷigu © ©
Digital edition of SII 20.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
